# Scheduled Job

## Overview

gSage AI — AI Agents CRUD tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `scheduled_job` | Manage Celery scheduled jobs: list, create, update, and enable/disable recurring tasks | `crud:scheduled_job:read`, `crud:scheduled_job:write` | — | — |

## Operations

### `scheduled_job`

- **`create`** — _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `name` | `string` | — | [create/update] Human-readable agent name. |
  | `description` | `string` | — | [create/update] Optional description. |
  | `job_type` | `string` | — | [create] Job type — PROMPT_RUN or SYSTEM_TASK. |
  | `cron_expression` | `string` | — | [create/update] 5-field standard crontab, e.g. '*/15 * * * *'. |
  | `timezone` | `string` | — | [create/update] IANA timezone for cron evaluation. |
  | `starts_at` | `string` | — | [create/update] ISO-8601 UTC start of window (null = now). |
  | `ends_at` | `string` | — | [create/update] ISO-8601 UTC end of window (null = indefinite). |
  | `max_runs` | `integer` | — | [create/update] Auto-deactivate after N runs. Omit for unlimited. |
  | `prompt_conversation_id` | `string` | — | [PROMPT_RUN] Target conversation UUID. Omit to create a fresh one per run. |
